findings.issue: Unreachable code after else-return in mock_monotonic
findings.suggestion: Remove dead return statement after the else block

findings.issue: Soft assertion with if-guard means test passes even if callback never fires (race condition)
findings.suggestion: Add a brief sleep or use threading.Event to ensure callback fires before assertion
Add optional timestamp parameter for deterministic tests

findings.issue: OR-assertion hard to debug on failure
findings.suggestion: Use a single specific assertion or split into separate checks

summary: 6 new test files with 258 tests covering calibration, main, multi-camera, pipeline, remapping, and stereo calibration. Well-structured, good edge case coverage. Two minor race-condition risks in callback tests.
